message:
fix(connectors): correct capability token tests in github, gmail, figma, google-calendar

Update generate_valid_token in integration tests to properly map
operation names to capability groups. Previously, operation names like
"github.create_issue" were used as capability_id, but the verifier
expects the capability group (e.g., "github.write"). Added match
expressions mapping each operation to its introspected capability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
